name: Shrimp Etouffee Serves
recipeIngredient: 1 Can italian peeled tomatoes, (14 oz) chopped, juices reserved
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy nonreactive 14-inch skillet, melt the butter over moderate heat.
2. Add the onions and celery to the skillet; cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
3. Add garlic and jalapeno; cook for an additional 2 minutes.
4. Stir in flour; cook, stirring constantly, for 5 minutes.
5. Stir in tomatoes (with juices), paprika, salt, black pepper, and cayenne into the skillet.
6. Bring to a simmer, cover, and cook until thickened, about 5 minutes.
7. Gently add shrimp and stir until they curl and turn pink, 2 to 3 minutes.
8. Stir in scallions and parsley; serve over cooked white rice.
